---
title: "Clinical survival analysis"
output: html_document
date: "2025-09-02"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir = normalizePath(".."))
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r load-clinical-data, include=FALSE}
load("data/clinical_data_sonia.Rdata")

SONIA_clinical_data <- ctdnadatalist[[1]]
SONIA_bor           <- ctdnadatalist[[14]]
SONIA_target        <- ctdnadatalist[[3]]

# Patients in the ctDNA (biomarker) cohort
sample_data <- readxl::read_excel("data/meta_data_SONIA_v6.xlsx") |>
    distinct(patnr)

# Determine whether each patient has target lesions
target_per_patient <- SONIA_target |>
    mutate(target = ifelse(tlnd == "Yes", "non-target", "target")) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    slice(1) |>
    ungroup() |>
    select(patnr, target)

# Score each response assessment, then keep the best (highest) per patient
best_response_per_patient <- SONIA_bor |>
    left_join(target_per_patient, by = "patnr") |>
    mutate(response_score = case_when(
        target == "non-target" & rspoa == "CR"            ~ 4,
        target == "non-target" & rspoa == "non CR/non PD" ~ 3,
        target == "non-target" & rspoa == "NE"            ~ 2,
        target == "non-target" & rspoa == "PD"            ~ 1,
        target == "target"     & rspoa == "CR"            ~ 4,
        target == "target"     & rspoa == "PR"            ~ 3,
        target == "target"     & rspoa == "SD"            ~ 2,
        target == "target"     & rspoa == "NE"            ~ 1,
        target == "target"     & rspoa == "PD"            ~ 0,
        TRUE ~ NA_real_
    )) |>
    group_by(patnr) |>
    slice_max(order_by = response_score, with_ties = FALSE) |>
    ungroup() |>
    select(patnr, rspoa)

# Attach best response and derive clinical variables
SONIA_clinical_data <- SONIA_clinical_data |>
    left_join(best_response_per_patient, by = "patnr") |>
    mutate(
        rspoa      = as.character(rspoa),
        rspoa      = ifelse(is.na(rspoa), "NE", rspoa),
        who_binary = ifelse(who == 0, 0, 1),
        # Two patients never started 1st line: impute 0 days
        lijn1days  = case_when(
            patnr == 86  ~ 0,
            patnr == 689 ~ 0,
            TRUE ~ as.numeric(lijn1days)
        ),
        lijn1mth = lijn1days / 365.25 * 12,
        lijn1yr  = lijn1days / 365.25
    )
```

```{r build-cohorts, include=FALSE}
# Biomarker cohort: SONIA patients with a ctDNA sample
SONIA_sample_data_merged <- SONIA_clinical_data |>
    semi_join(sample_data, by = "patnr") |>
    mutate(group = "biomarker cohort")

# Non-biomarker cohort: the remaining SONIA patients
Data_SONIA_outside <- SONIA_clinical_data |>
    anti_join(sample_data, by = "patnr") |>
    mutate(group = "non-biomarker cohort")

# Combined dataset for biomarker vs non-biomarker comparisons
combined_data <- bind_rows(SONIA_sample_data_merged, Data_SONIA_outside)

# Per-arm subsets within the biomarker cohort
arm_A <- SONIA_sample_data_merged |> filter(arm == "Arm A")
arm_B <- SONIA_sample_data_merged |> filter(arm == "Arm B")

# Fisher's exact / chi-square helpers that align factor levels across groups
run_fisher <- function(x, y) {
    lev <- union(names(table(x)), names(table(y)))
    tab <- rbind(table(factor(x, levels = lev)),
                 table(factor(y, levels = lev)))
    fisher.test(tab)
}

run_chisq <- function(x, y) {
    lev <- union(names(table(x)), names(table(y)))
    tab <- rbind(table(factor(x, levels = lev)),
                 table(factor(y, levels = lev)))
    chisq.test(tab)
}
```

## 1. Baseline characteristics: Arm A vs Arm B (biomarker cohort)

```{r baseline-by-arm}
cat("=== Arm A (n =", nrow(arm_A), ") ===\n")
cat("Age: median =", median(arm_A$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", IQR =", IQR(arm_A$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", range =", paste(range(arm_A$age, na.rm = TRUE), collapse = "-"), "\n")
print(table(arm_A$who_binary))
print(table(arm_A$newlymeta))
print(table(arm_A$viscyn))
print(table(arm_A$boneonly))
print(table(arm_A$histology))
print(table(arm_A$firsttrip))
print(table(arm_A$rspoa))

cat("\n=== Arm B (n =", nrow(arm_B), ") ===\n")
cat("Age: median =", median(arm_B$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", IQR =", IQR(arm_B$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", range =", paste(range(arm_B$age, na.rm = TRUE), collapse = "-"), "\n")
print(table(arm_B$who_binary))
print(table(arm_B$newlymeta))
print(table(arm_B$viscyn))
print(table(arm_B$boneonly))
print(table(arm_B$histology))
print(table(arm_B$firsttrip))
print(table(arm_B$rspoa))

# Age: t-test
print(t.test(arm_A$age, arm_B$age))

# Categorical variables: Fisher's exact test (small samples)
print(run_fisher(arm_A$who_binary, arm_B$who_binary))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$newlymeta,  arm_B$newlymeta))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$viscyn,     arm_B$viscyn))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$boneonly,   arm_B$boneonly))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$histology,  arm_B$histology))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$rspoa,      arm_B$rspoa))
print(run_fisher(arm_A$firsttrip,  arm_B$firsttrip))
```

## 2. Time on first-line treatment: Arm A vs Arm B

```{r lijn1-by-arm}
fit_lijn1_arm <- survival::survfit(
    survival::Surv(lijn1mth, lijn1af) ~ arm,
    data = SONIA_sample_data_merged
)

print(survival::survdiff(
    survival::Surv(lijn1mth, lijn1af) ~ arm,
    data = SONIA_sample_data_merged
))

round(summary(fit_lijn1_arm)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1)
```

## 3. Progression-free survival: Arm A vs Arm B

```{r pfs1-by-arm}
surv_pfs1   <- survival::Surv(SONIA_sample_data_merged$pfs1mth, SONIA_sample_data_merged$pfs1event)
fit_pfs1    <- survival::survfit(surv_pfs1 ~ arm, data = SONIA_sample_data_merged)
cox_pfs1    <- survival::coxph(surv_pfs1 ~ arm, data = SONIA_sample_data_merged)
ph_pfs1     <- survival::cox.zph(cox_pfs1)

cat("=== PFS1 medians (months) ===\n")
print(round(summary(fit_pfs1)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1))
cat("\n=== Cox model (PFS1 ~ arm) ===\n")
print(summary(cox_pfs1)$conf.int)
cat("PH test p =", round(ph_pfs1$table["arm", "p"], 3), "\n")

km_pfs1 <- survminer::ggsurvplot(
    fit_pfs1,
    data         = SONIA_sample_data_merged,
    pval         = TRUE,
    risk.table   = "nrisk_cumcensor",
    censor       = TRUE,
    conf.int     = TRUE,
    title        = "PFS in combination treatment and monotherapy arms",
    legend.title = "",
    legend.labs  = c("Combination arm", "Monotherapy arm"),
    legend       = "none",
    xlab         = "Time (months)",
    xlim         = c(0, 30),
    break.time.by = 5,
    palette      = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00"),
    ggtheme      = theme_light() +
        theme(
            plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
            legend.position  = "bottom",
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
            strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
        )
)
print(km_pfs1)
ggpubr::ggexport(km_pfs1, filename = "results/figures/clinical_survival_pfs1_by_arm.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
```

## 4. Overall survival: Arm A vs Arm B

```{r os-by-arm}
surv_os_bio <- survival::Surv(SONIA_sample_data_merged$osmth, SONIA_sample_data_merged$osevent)
fit_os_bio  <- survival::survfit(surv_os_bio ~ arm, data = SONIA_sample_data_merged)
cox_os_bio  <- survival::coxph(surv_os_bio ~ arm, data = SONIA_sample_data_merged)
ph_os_bio   <- survival::cox.zph(cox_os_bio)

cat("=== OS medians (months) ===\n")
print(round(summary(fit_os_bio)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1))
cat("\n=== Cox model (OS ~ arm) ===\n")
print(summary(cox_os_bio)$conf.int)
cat("PH test p =", round(ph_os_bio$table["arm", "p"], 3), "\n")

km_os_bio <- survminer::ggsurvplot(
    fit_os_bio,
    data         = SONIA_sample_data_merged,
    pval         = TRUE,
    risk.table   = "nrisk_cumcensor",
    censor       = TRUE,
    conf.int     = TRUE,
    title        = "OS in combination treatment and monotherapy arms",
    legend.title = "",
    legend.labs  = c("Combination arm", "Monotherapy arm"),
    legend       = "none",
    xlab         = "Time (months)",
    xlim         = c(0, 36),
    break.time.by = 5,
    palette      = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00"),
    ggtheme      = theme_light() +
        theme(
            plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
            legend.position  = "bottom",
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
            strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
        )
)
print(km_os_bio)
ggpubr::ggexport(km_os_bio, filename = "results/figures/clinical_survival_os_by_arm.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
```

## 5. Baseline characteristics: biomarker vs non-biomarker cohort

```{r cohort-comparison}
cat("Biomarker cohort age: median =", median(SONIA_sample_data_merged$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", range =", paste(range(SONIA_sample_data_merged$age, na.rm = TRUE), collapse = "-"), "\n")
cat("Non-biomarker cohort age: median =", median(Data_SONIA_outside$age, na.rm = TRUE),
    ", range =", paste(range(Data_SONIA_outside$age, na.rm = TRUE), collapse = "-"), "\n")
print(t.test(SONIA_sample_data_merged$age, Data_SONIA_outside$age))

# Categorical variables: chi-square test (large samples)
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$arm,        Data_SONIA_outside$arm))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$who_binary, Data_SONIA_outside$who_binary))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$newlymeta,  Data_SONIA_outside$newlymeta))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$viscyn,     Data_SONIA_outside$viscyn))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$boneonly,   Data_SONIA_outside$boneonly))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$histology,  Data_SONIA_outside$histology))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$firsttrip,  Data_SONIA_outside$firsttrip))
print(run_chisq(SONIA_sample_data_merged$rspoa,      Data_SONIA_outside$rspoa))

# Time on first-line treatment: biomarker vs non-biomarker
fit_lijn1_group <- survival::survfit(
    survival::Surv(lijn1mth, lijn1af) ~ group,
    data = combined_data
)
print(survival::survdiff(
    survival::Surv(lijn1mth, lijn1af) ~ group,
    data = combined_data
))
round(summary(fit_lijn1_group)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1)
```

## 6. Progression-free survival: biomarker vs non-biomarker cohort

```{r pfs1-combined}
surv_pfs1_grp <- survival::Surv(combined_data$pfs1mth, combined_data$pfs1event)
fit_pfs1_grp  <- survival::survfit(surv_pfs1_grp ~ group, data = combined_data)

cat("=== PFS1 medians (months) ===\n")
print(round(summary(fit_pfs1_grp)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1))

km_pfs1_comb <- survminer::ggsurvplot(
    fit_pfs1_grp,
    data         = combined_data,
    pval         = TRUE,
    risk.table   = "nrisk_cumcensor",
    censor       = TRUE,
    conf.int     = TRUE,
    title        = "PFS in biomarker and non-biomarker SONIA cohort",
    legend.title = "",
    legend.labs  = c("Biomarker cohort", "Non-biomarker cohort"),
    legend       = "none",
    xlab         = "Time (months)",
    xlim         = c(0, 30),
    break.time.by = 5,
    palette      = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00"),
    ggtheme      = theme_light() +
        theme(
            plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
            legend.position  = "bottom",
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
            strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
        )
)
print(km_pfs1_comb)
ggpubr::ggexport(km_pfs1_comb, filename = "results/figures/clinical_survival_pfs1_biomarker_vs_nonbiomarker.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
```

## 7. Overall survival: biomarker vs non-biomarker cohort

```{r os-combined}
surv_os_grp <- survival::Surv(combined_data$osmth, combined_data$osevent)
fit_os_grp  <- survival::survfit(surv_os_grp ~ group, data = combined_data)

cat("=== OS medians (months) ===\n")
print(round(summary(fit_os_grp)$table[, c("median", "0.95LCL", "0.95UCL")], 1))

km_os_comb <- survminer::ggsurvplot(
    fit_os_grp,
    data         = combined_data,
    pval         = TRUE,
    risk.table   = "nrisk_cumcensor",
    censor       = TRUE,
    conf.int     = TRUE,
    title        = "OS in biomarker and non-biomarker SONIA cohort",
    legend.title = "",
    legend.labs  = c("Biomarker cohort", "Non-biomarker cohort"),
    legend       = "none",
    xlab         = "Time (months)",
    xlim         = c(0, 60),
    break.time.by = 5,
    palette      = c("#0072B2", "#E69F00"),
    ggtheme      = theme_light() +
        theme(
            plot.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.title       = element_text(size = 15, face = "bold"),
            axis.text.x      = element_text(size = 10),
            legend.position  = "bottom",
            strip.background = element_rect(fill = "lightgray"),
            strip.text       = element_text(color = "black", size = 10)
        )
)
print(km_os_comb)
ggpubr::ggexport(km_os_comb, filename = "results/figures/clinical_survival_os_biomarker_vs_nonbiomarker.pdf", width = 7, height = 5)
```
